description: Calculate the true land area of all countries in square kilometers using the dataset at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp. Ensure the calculation uses an equal-area projection, specifically 'World Cylindrical Equal Area' (EPSG:54034) or 'World Mollweide' (EPSG:54009). The results must be stored in a new field named 'AREA_KM2' (Double) and the final layer exported to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_area.shp.
